dashboard.title: Emissions Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Track and monitor your organization's carbon footprint
dashboard.calendarHint: Chart will display filtered data based on selected period.
dashboard.submissionSavedBody: Your emission(s) have been calculated and saved. Data below includes your latest submission.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure your organization and notification preferences
settings.weeklyDigestDesc: Get a weekly summary of your emissions

dataInput.title: Data Input
dataInput.subtitle: Upload and manage emissions data by site
dataInput.noSiteBannerBody: Choose a site from the dropdown or tabs to upload documents or enter data manually. Use Add Site to register each facility.
dataInput.uploadMethodDesc: Upload invoices or bills for automatic AI extraction
dataInput.manualMethodDesc: Enter emission data directly into forms
dataInput.manualPanelIntro: Scope 1 & 2 entries below are saved for this site. Add rows, then Submit Data.
dataInput.submitHelp: Data is used to calculate emissions and is saved to your dashboard.
dataInput.expectedDocHint: Select the expected month and year of your receipt or utility bill. We will verify this against the extracted date.
dataInput.dragDropHelp: or click to browse – you can select multiple files (PDF, Excel, JPEG, PNG). Max {{maxMb}} MB per file, up to {{maxFiles}} files.
dataInput.readingReceiptBody: URIMPACT AI is extracting numbers, then emissions are calculated and saved.
dataInput.uploadInfoAi: URIMPACT AI extracts numbers from the receipt; you verify, then Submit calculates emissions and saves
dataInput.uploadInfoLimit: Upload limit: max {{maxMb}} MB per file, up to {{maxFiles}} files per batch
dataInput.uploadInfoLogin: Log in with the backend to use AI extraction (e.g. demo@urimpact.com)
dataInput.verifyHint: Edit if needed. "Submit all" saves only receipts for this site.
dataInput.dateMismatchWarning: Doesn't match expected month ({{month}} {{year}}). Correct the date above if needed.
dataInput.dateHelpExtracted: Add date if not extracted from receipt
dataInput.placeholderRegion: e.g. AE, AE-DU (extracted when on receipt)
dataInput.placeholderSupplierLong: e.g. utility company, gas station (extracted when on receipt)
dataInput.tipEachFacility: Add every facility as its own site
dataInput.loginHintRecent: Log in to view and delete saved emissions for {{site}} ({{year}}).
dataInput.recentReceiptsSub: Emissions created from receipt or document upload; delete a row to remove that saved emission.
dataInput.emptyEmissions: No saved emissions for this site in {{year}} yet.
dataInput.emptyReceipts: No receipt-based emissions for this site in {{year}} yet.
dataInput.confirmDeleteSite: Delete site "{{name}}"? This removes it from site lists and local site activity history.
dataInput.modalAddSiteSubtitle: Register a facility for this organization

toast.selectSiteManual: Select a site to attribute manual entries.
toast.addEntryWithData: Please add at least one entry with date and amount (or electricity).
toast.loginManualDemo: Log in to save manual entries (e.g. demo@urimpact.com / Demo123!).
toast.selectSiteUpload: Select a specific site before uploading documents.
toast.loginUploadDemo: Log in with the backend (e.g. demo@urimpact.com / Demo123!) to extract receipt data with AI.
toast.maxFiles: Maximum {{max}} files per upload. Please select fewer files.
toast.fileTooLarge: File size limit is {{maxMb}} MB per file. Too large: {{names}}
toast.uploadingSingle: Uploading "{{file}}" – URIMPACT AI is reading the receipt...
toast.dateMismatchSingle: The date on the receipt doesn't match your selected expected month ({{month}} {{year}}). Please correct the date in the table below before submitting.
toast.entriesExtractedSubmitAll: {{count}} entries extracted. Verify and use "Submit all" to save.
toast.verifyNumbersSubmit: Verify the numbers below and press Submit to calculate emissions.
toast.dateMismatchBatch: The date on one or more receipts doesn't match your selected expected month ({{month}} {{year}}). Please correct the dates in the table below before submitting.
toast.receiptsExtractedMany: {{count}} receipts extracted. Verify each and Submit.
toast.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again.
toast.fillActivityFields: Please fill in Activity type, Amount, and Unit.
toast.savedCo2eNavigate: Saved: {{amount}} kg CO2e. Taking you to Dashboard…
toast.fillAllEntriesBatch: Please fill in Activity type, Amount, and Unit for all entries.
toast.batchSavedSkipped: {{count}} emission(s) saved, {{skipped}} row(s) skipped (invalid data). Taking you to Dashboard…
toast.batchSaved: {{count}} emission(s) saved. Taking you to Dashboard…
toast.fillAllBeforeSubmitAll: Please fill in Activity type, Amount, and Unit for all entries before submitting all.
toast.submitAllSaved: {{totalCount}} emission(s) saved. Taking you to Dashboard…
toast.fillSiteFields: Please fill Site name, code, city, and facility type.
toast.oneSiteMinimum: At least one site must remain.
toast.pendingBeforeDelete: Submit or clear pending verification rows for this site before deleting it.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Generate comprehensive emission reports for compliance and analysis
reports.gateBody: To access Reports, please complete the Inputs & Constraints form in the Decarbonization section. Your target year and ambition level will be used to generate the Decarbonization Report.
reports.toastEndAfterStart: End date must be after start date.
reports.toastPdfFail: PDF export failed. Try again or use Print to PDF.
reports.tapDateRange: Tap to pick a date range
reports.exportHint: Exports directly as PDF via URIMPACT (urimpact.sa)
reports.monthlyTrendLead: Historical trend from uploaded receipts and manual entries
reports.monthlyTrendNote: This chart reflects actual recorded emissions data for the reporting period. It is independent of the pathway model.
reports.s4TierLine: Tier: {{tier}} | R_total: {{rTotal}} | LAR_req: {{lar}} tCO₂e/yr ({{larPct}} of baseline)
reports.s4ResidualLine: Structural residual ceiling: {{res}} tCO₂e ({{resPct}} of baseline) | Removal obligation: {{rem}} tCO₂e/yr (one-to-one neutralisation)
reports.s5Lead: BAU comparator at 0% growth vs. intervention target: {{bau}} → {{target}} tCO₂e by {{year}}
reports.s5Note: BAU is a comparator scenario only. It does not affect pathway or residual calculations.
reports.s6Lead: Structural residual ceiling: {{res}} tCO₂e ({{pct}} of baseline) — policy-defined for {{tier}}
reports.s7Lead: Removal obligation: {{rem}} tCO₂e/yr — translates to {{trees}} trees/yr at {{rateKg}} kg CO₂e/tree/yr
reports.s7TreeHighlightDesc: Based on default sequestration rate of {{rateKg}} kg CO₂e/tree/year. This is illustrative; actual removal capacity depends on verified project data.
reports.s8Fallback: Priority levers, governance implications, and planning considerations for {{org}} are derived from the dominant emission sources and required annual pace.
reports.s8BoundaryDetail: This model covers the operational emissions included in the current inventory. Financial projections and engineering feasibility are excluded by design.
reports.s9RoadmapPlaceholder: Roadmap narrative will appear here once generated. Ensure you are signed in and have saved a decarbonisation configuration.
reports.s10Assumption1: The model is based on absolute emissions reduction, not intensity-based metrics.
reports.s10Assumption2: StructuralResidual% is a policy-defined governance parameter tied to ambition tier selection — not an empirical measurement of abatement capacity.
reports.s10Assumption3: The annual removal obligation equals the structural residual ceiling (one-to-one neutralisation principle).
reports.s10Assumption4: The linear pathway is a planning simplification, not a performance guarantee.
reports.s10Assumption5: The emissions boundary is limited to the sources and categories included in this model. Financial projections and engineering feasibility are excluded by design.
reports.s10Assumption6: Tier mapping is policy-defined and versioned. Policy version: {{version}}.
reports.s10AssumptionBau: BAU scenario is a comparator only; it does not affect pathway or residual calculations.
reports.s10AssumptionTrees: Tree equivalency is illustrative and uses the default sequestration rate (0.025 tCO₂e/tree/yr). Actual removal capacity requires third-party verification.
reports.s10Assumption7: No third-party verification is included unless explicitly stated.
reports.s11Title: S11 — Appendix: audit traceability & data sources
reports.s11Lead: Run manifest and full variable audit trail

decarb.title: Decarbonization scenario
decarb.mainSubtitle: See how planting trees offsets your residual emissions (post-pathway). Baseline uses report residual from your ambition level.
decarb.notConfiguredTitle: Set your Inputs & Constraints to see the calculation
decarb.notConfiguredBody: Define your ambition level and target year, then save the configuration to calculate residual emissions and offset potential.
decarb.treesPlantedDesc: Trees planted in verified reforestation projects.
decarb.saveConfigForPlanting: Save your configuration to enable tree planting.
decarb.selectProjectAbove: Select a project above to view details.
decarb.verifiedBlock: Verified: Each tree is verified by high resolution satellite or drone data.
decarb.reportTreesHint: Report (S7) trees required annually: {{trees}} trees at {{rate}} tCO₂e/tree/yr — same formula as this offset.

profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and preferences

userManagement.subtitle: Manage team members and their permissions. New users sign in with limited access by role.

notifications.subtitle: Changes across the platform with user attribution
notifications.adminOnly: Notifications are only available to administrators.
notifications.empty: No recent activity yet. Actions taken across the dashboard will appear here.

login.subtitle: Track, analyze, and reduce your organization's carbon footprint with our comprehensive emission management platform.
login.signInSubtitle: Sign in to continue to your dashboard
login.signUpSubtitle: Start your journey to net zero
login.passwordHelp: Min 8 characters, with uppercase, lowercase and a number
